title: Silouanos #4610
definition:
Silas = "woody"

 1) a Roman citizen, the companion of the apostle Paul on several of
    his missionary journeys
nasbUsage:

 1) a Roman citizen, the companion of the apostle Paul on several of
    his missionary journeys

    NASB:  sylvan,  Silvanus, alt. form of the name Silas:
